name: Big Foot Recreation District
description: Come play pickleball at Big Foot Recreation District in Walworth, WI! There are 24 hard courts. 16 are outdoors and 8 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Geneva Lakes Family YMCA
description: Geneva Lakes Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Lake Geneva, WI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are not available.

name: Grand Geneva Resort & Spa
description: Grand Geneva Resort & Spa is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lake Geneva, WI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food and restrooms.

name: Lake Geneva Tennis Club
description: Lake Geneva Tennis Club is a place to play pickleball in Lake Geneva, WI. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights.

name: PIER 290
description: PIER 290 is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Williams Bay, WI. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Whitewater Armory
description: Whitewater Armory is a place to play pickleball in Whitewater, WI. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Wilma H. Lauterbach Park
description: Wilma H. Lauterbach Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Delavan, WI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
